mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO crisis_report
report_id,
appointment_id,
counselor_id,
student_id,
report_type,
crisis_level,
incident_description,
risk_assessment,
immediate_actions,
recommended_actions,
handwritten_report_url,
#{reportId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{appointmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{counselorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{studentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reportType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{crisisLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{incidentDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{riskAssessment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{immediateActions,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{recommendedActions,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{handwrittenReportUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update: update crisis_report set crisis_level = #{crisisLevel} where report_id = #{reportId}
UPDATE crisis_report SET report_status = 'PROCESSED', reviewer_id = #{param2}, review_notes = #{param3}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE report_id = #{param1}
UPDATE crisis_report SET report_status = 'REJECTED', reviewer_id = #{param2}, review_notes = #{param3}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE report_id = #{param1}
